Spider-Man.adjustment: Web swing speed increased by 10%. Improved responsiveness for wall-crawling mechanics.
Friendly neighborhood ability cooldown reduced from 12s to 10s.
Ultimate ability charge rate increased by 8%.

Iron Man.adjustment: Repulsor beam damage increased by 12%. Flight duration extended by 2 seconds.
Energy management system overhauled. Missiles now consume 15% less energy.

Captain America.adjustment: Combat mechanic adjustments. Shield throw now returns faster (0.8s vs 1s). Normal attack chain optimized.
Sentinel Strike combo consistency improved. Stun duration increased by 0.3s.

Thor.adjustment: Lightning strike area of effect expanded by 15%. Hammer throw velocity increased.
Mjolnir charge time reduced by 1 second. Thunder ability cooldown adjusted.

Black Widow.adjustment: Grappling hook range extended by 20%. Improved mobility for escape sequences.
Precision strike critical hit chance increased from 20% to 25%.

Hulk.adjustment: Health regeneration passive now active in combat. Damage reduction increased to 15%.
Ground slam radius increased. Knockback effect enhanced for crowd control.

Black Panther.adjustment: Vibranium absorption rate increased by 8%. Claw attack combo speed improved.
Kinetic energy redirection cooldown reduced. Ultimate ability duration extended.

Doctor Strange.adjustment: Portal traversal speed increased by 25%. Spell casting time reduced for all spells.
Time manipulation ability reworked. Damage scaling adjusted for balance.

Scarlet Witch.adjustment: Chaos magic projectile speed increased. Probability field now covers larger area.
Hex ability duration extended from 4s to 5s. Mana cost reduced by 10%.

Vision.adjustment: Density alteration phase duration increased. Phasing now allows passing through obstacles.
Mind gem power output increased by 12%. Attack combo damage scaling improved.

Ant-Man.adjustment: Size manipulation cooldown reduced. Giant form damage bonus increased from 20% to 25%.
Quantum tunneling ability rebalanced. Escape range extended significantly.
